nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to help deliver a subject matter than can be perceived in a certain way and I do not want it to be received like that

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I do wish AI could help with gathering patient information or their intake so we can streamline it faster

nodes.label: AI as clinical information source
nodes.label_negative: Human-only clinical judgment for symptom evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle patient phone calls or messages that are related to their symptoms as I do not want something missed

nodes.label: AI integration into hospital systems
nodes.label_negative: Manual surgery coding and insurance authorization
nodes.grounding_span: I also schedule surgeries and it would be nice if AI can code the surgery's and obtain authorization from the insurance company

nodes.label: Patient safety and quality of care
nodes.grounding_span: I do not want something missed that could be detrimental to the patient

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: decreases the time it would normally take me to do it myself

nodes.label: Financial maximization through clean billing
nodes.grounding_span: processing clean billing claims to insurance companies to maximize reimbursement

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for communications
nodes.grounding_span: I am satisfied when it helps me answer patients' questions and decreases the time

nodes.label: Reservation about AI for clinical symptom assessment
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle patient phone calls or messages that are related to their symptoms

nodes.label: Aspirational openness toward AI for intake and billing
nodes.grounding_span: Biggest opportunities would be patient intake and processing clean billing claims

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — upfront specification then back-and-forth adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: I try to give it as much info upfront and then go back and forth as needed

nodes.label: Domain boundary setting between administrative and clinical tasks
